_provenance.source: UPDATE_BRIEF_FOR_CODE_CHAT.md §4 (verified 30-run Monte Carlo, frozen Paper 1/2 April 2026)
_provenance.note: Per-round time series are deterministic shapes whose endpoints match the verified FND/HND scalars. Every user-visible scalar (KPI badges, tables, summaries) comes from the brief or paper text directly. No fabricated values.

recovery.note: LAF detects compromised relays via blockchain trust scores and reroutes within ~47 rounds (target ≤50).
